allow: Bash(osascript -e 'tell app "System Events" to count processes whose name is "Simulator"')
Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "Simulator" to get {position, size} of window 1')
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; vs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([v for v in vs if v.startswith\('3.0'\)]\)")

Bash(ls ~/Library/Logs/DiagnosticReports/ | grep -c SwipePhotos; xcrun simctl launch booted com.podhorets.swipephotos; until xcrun simctl openurl booted "swipephotos:///review/videos" 2>/dev/null; do sleep 1; done; echo "opened videos session")

Bash(grep -n "Bundling failed\\|Unable to resolve\\|Bundled" "/private/tmp/claude-501/-Users-podhorets-Code-ai-apps-swipe-photos/52dfb055-b0d4-4bf7-ab97-451822367adb/tasks/b7lzhhpbk.output" | tail -5; sed -n '/Bundling failed/,/require.context/p' "/private/tmp/claude-501/-Users-podhorets-Code-ai-apps-swipe-photos/52dfb055-b0d4-4bf7-ab97-451822367adb/tasks/b7lzhhpbk.output" | head -25)
